zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Tourney於1468年出生在英國肯特海時，她的父親Thomas Tourney24歲，母親Alice De Brockhill23歲。她於1488年與John Richard Stacy在英國賀特福爾蕾托 哈達哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年在英國肯特騰特爾登享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tourney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Turney
meanings: habitational name from any of the places in northern France called Tournai-sur-Dive (Orne), Tournay-sur-Odon (Calvados), or Tourny (Eure), or occasionally from Tournai in Hainaut (Belgium).

perhaps occasionally an occupational name from Middle English tournei, turnai ‘lawyer’ (Anglo-Norman French tourné), or a nickname from Middle English tournei(en) ‘(to) joust, take part in a tournament’ (Old French torneier). Compare Turner .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Tourney was born in 1468, in Hythe, Kent, England, her father, Thomas Tourney, was 24 and her mother, Alice De Brockhill, was 23. She married John Richard Stacy in 1488, in Little Hadham, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1545, in Tenterden, Kent, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Tourney est née en 1468, à Hythe, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Tourney, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice De Brockhill, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Richard Stacy en 1488, à Little Hadham, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1545, à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Tourneyが1468年にイギリスケントhイスで生まれた時，父Thomas Tourneyは24歳，母Alice De Brockhillは23歳であった。1488年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアリットル ハドハムでJohn Richard Stacyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1545年にイギリスケントテンテルデンで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Tourney(이)가 1468년 영국 켄트 히테에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Tourney(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice De Brockhill(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1488년 영국 허트퍼드실르 리틀 하드함에서 John Richard Stacy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 영국 켄트 텐터든에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Tourney родилась в 1468 г. в местности хит, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Tourney было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice De Brockhill, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Richard Stacy в 1488 г. в местности литл хадхам, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1545 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.
